name: senior-backend
description: Comprehensive backend development skill for building scalable backend systems using NodeJS, Express, Go, Python, Postgres, GraphQL, REST APIs. Includes API scaffolding, database optimization, security implementation, and performance tuning. Use when designing APIs, optimizing database queries, implementing business logic, handling authentication/authorization, or reviewing backend code.
qualityReason: Broad backend expertise with key areas
capabilities: Scaffold REST and GraphQL APIs using automated Python scripts with configurable templates
Analyze and optimize database queries with migration tooling and performance recommendations
Generate load testing reports for API endpoints to identify bottlenecks
Apply backend security practices including authentication, authorization, and input validation patterns
Follow established API design patterns and anti-patterns from reference documentation
author: alirezarezvani
securitySummary: This is a documentation and tooling skill containing Python CLI scripts for API scaffolding, database migration, and load testing. The static scanner produced 115 false positive findings by misidentifying markdown code fences as shell backticks and YAML frontmatter as cryptographic algorithms. All detected patterns are benign documentation and standard Python file I/O operations for controlled output export.
valueStatement: Design and implement production-ready backend systems with automated tools for API scaffolding, database optimization, and performance tuning. The skill includes three CLI tools and comprehensive reference guides for Node.js, Python, Go, PostgreSQL, GraphQL, and REST APIs.
userTitle: Build Scalable Backend Systems with Senior Guidance
limitations: Does not generate complete production applications - provides scaffolding and guidance only
Does not execute actual database migrations - generates migration files for review
Does not perform real-time production monitoring or alerting

useCases.title: Generate API Boilerplate
useCases.description: Quickly scaffold new API projects with best-practice structure and configurations for Node.js, Python, or Go.

useCases.title: Optimize Database Queries
useCases.description: Analyze existing database patterns and receive recommendations for query optimization and indexing.

useCases.title: Validate API Performance
useCases.description: Run load testing analysis on existing APIs to identify performance bottlenecks and scaling issues.

promptTemplates.title: Create New API
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the senior-backend skill to scaffold a new REST API project at /path/to/project using Node.js and Express with authentication endpoints.

promptTemplates.title: Database Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the senior-backend database migration tool to analyze /path/to/project and provide optimization recommendations for PostgreSQL queries.

promptTemplates.title: API Load Test
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the senior-backend api_load_tester to analyze the API at /path/to/api and generate a performance report with bottleneck identification.

promptTemplates.title: Security Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review the backend_security_practices reference guide and apply authentication and authorization patterns to my existing API code.

bestPractices: Always review generated scaffold code before committing to production use
Test database migrations on staging environments before applying to production
Combine multiple senior-backend tools for comprehensive API development workflows
antiPatterns: Do not apply generated code directly to production without security review
Avoid running database migration tools against production databases without backup
Do not skip input validation even when using scaffolded authentication code

faq.question: What programming languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill supports Node.js, Express, Python, Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, Kotlin, and Swift for backend development.

faq.question: Can I use this skill with cloud databases?
faq.answer: Yes, the database tools work with PostgreSQL, NeonDB, Supabase, and other PostgreSQL-compatible cloud providers.

faq.question: Does the load tester actually send requests?
faq.answer: The load tester analyzes API structure and generates load testing configurations and reports, but does not execute external requests.

faq.question: How do I customize the generated API scaffolding?
faq.answer: Pass options to the api_scaffolder.py script or modify the generated template files before deployment.

faq.question: Is the skill suitable for microservices architecture?
faq.answer: Yes, the patterns and tools support both monolithic and microservices architectures with container deployment guidance.

faq.question: Does this skill handle authentication implementation?
faq.answer: The skill provides authentication patterns and scaffolding templates, but actual implementation requires customization for your specific requirements.
